name: RPlog_Death_of_Sabbathius_Osbourne
title: The Death of Sabbathius Osbourne
summary: Tracking Jessalyn Valios's captor, Luke Skywalker lands his X-Wing aboard the corvette Ummagumma to rescue her from the Sith Lord Sabbath, who has been expecting him. Sabbath lures Luke into the aft corridor where Jessalyn is held, reveals she was only bait, and tries to goad Luke into anger by firing on her. Luke deflects the bolt and the two duel; Sabbath hurls his lightsaber and severs Luke's prosthetic right hand, but Luke runs the Dark Lord through the chest. As the dying Sabbath triggers a self-destruct, Luke and Jessalyn flee to the X-Wing and escape just as the Ummagumma explodes. Reaching the Black Dragon, Luke reports Sabbath's death to Leia and is tended to alongside Jessalyn by Leia, the street kids Tacra and Tand, and Lando, the group settling in to rest before jumping back to New Republic space and Coruscant.
